base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of overworld_full_map — a tile (overworld_map) from 1987 final fantasy. Full overworld map — entire FF1 world composite, 4096×4352 canvas. Continents + oceans + rivers + 9 towns + 11 dungeons all marked. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
